prompt: Single crisp glass tap on polished stone surface, bright and clean, subtle resonance. Short UI click sound for a fantasy game.
Bubbling liquid in a cauldron reaching a climax, then a bright crystalline chime of success. Magical alchemy recipe discovery. Warm, satisfying completion sound.
Flat wet bubbling sound of a failed potion, then a dull hollow thud like a cork popping into mud. Disappointing but not harsh. Fantasy alchemy failure.
Cascading crystal chimes ascending in pitch, magical sparkle and shimmer, building to a brief triumphant swell. Recipe discovery fanfare for a fantasy game. Bright, wondrous, enchanting.
Sharp stone mechanism snap followed by a metallic clang, quick and jarring. Dungeon trap springing. Fantasy RPG danger sound.
Two or three gold coins clinking together with a bright shimmer resonance. Treasure find in a fantasy dungeon. Quick and rewarding.
Gentle flowing water sound with a warm magical tone rising, soft chime at the end. Healing spring in a fantasy RPG. Soothing and restorative.
Quick sword clash on armor, brief struggle, then a short triumphant horn note. Victory over a beast in fantasy combat. Crisp and heroic.
Heavy dull impact of being struck, muffled grunt of pain, slight reverb. Taking damage from a beast attack in a fantasy dungeon. Not gory, but impactful.
Heavy wooden door creaking open, then footsteps on stone fading into distance. Hero leaving on an expedition. Fantasy RPG adventure departure.
Wooden chest lid opening with a creak, then coins and items tumbling and settling. Collecting treasure loot. Fantasy RPG reward sound.
Tavern door swinging open with ambient chatter, then a confident greeting voice, brief handshake sound. Recruiting a new hero companion in a fantasy RPG.
Glass bottle uncorked with a pop, liquid gulping sound, then a warm magical aura rising with subtle sparkle. Consuming a potion for permanent stat boost.
Grand orchestral fanfare beginning with a horn call, building with strings and timpani to a triumphant climax with cymbal crash. Fantasy RPG game completion victory theme. Majestic and celebratory.
Single soft bell chime, warm and gentle, like a small silver bell tapped once. Subtle notification alert for a fantasy game UI.

Ambient alchemist laboratory atmosphere: crackling fireplace, occasional bubbling of potions in glass flasks, subtle wind through stone walls, distant dripping water. Warm, cozy, mysterious. Seamless loop.
